column1: Hey Bailey, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Ideally I would like to go to Cabo from March 16th to 20 or so for four nights. I will be flying from Phoenix even though I go to school at UNLV.
Okay bet. how many ppl in your group?
okay cool! did you have a budget in mind of how much youre looking to spend?
I like the tesoro hotel for four nights starting on March 16th if possible
Got you I'll pull pricing for a single now. how soon were you looking to get things booked?
Got it I'll pull pricing for a single now. how soon were you looking to get things booked?
awesome. waiting on pricing for the single then will do a flight scan to get you your package!
Hey just checking in to see if you have the pricing yet?
yoo Pardon the delay bro, been in meetings all day
but for the Tesoro for the 16-20, looking at $1385
What does that 1385 include in terms of events? And also can you price it with a round trip flight from Phoenix and let me know how much that would cost please? Thanks so much for your help.
morning bailey. yes will email you the full breakdown so you have it there. will add the flight option as well
whats the best email to send to?
just sent it over lmk if it came through
perfect. lmk if youre ready to move forward
perfect. I'll set up the reservation for you right now
Sweet yeah I'm j waiting out side terminal 2
Word. I have the transportation team on notice they are going to figure out how to reach you, they have your number and all, should be calling you soon
Bailey brotha! Gonna connect you with Alex so you can get your party pass tickets for tonight
Word Alex should be hittin you up shortly!
Do you know what time I get pick up on Friday?
Yooo Bailey brotha checkin in. Hope everything's going smooth. Will keep you posted on your shuttle time for Friday as soon as it's posted
What's good bro, pickup time is 10:30a tomorrow to get to the airport
